languages.text: Простор более никогда не видел Себериана фон Валанциус. Его имя еще несколько раз звучало в устах недовольных своим положением аристократических домов на Даргонусе, которые пытались устроить заговор и свергнуть Лорд-капитана под эгидой "поиска потерянного прородителя". Но когда последний из интриганов испустил дух, возвращение Себериана вновь превратилось в странную байку вроде тех, которые офицеры флагмана рассказывают друг другу в редкие минуты отдыха.

Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.
languages.original_text: Простор более никогда не видел Себериана фон Валанциус. Но когда последний из интриганов испустил дух, возвращение Себериана вновь превратилось в странную байку вроде тех, которые офицеры флагмана рассказывают друг другу в редкие минуты отдыха.

languages.text: ヴァランシウスのセベリアンは、その後、宇宙のどこにも姿を見せなかった。しかし、彼の名は、ダゴヌスで不満を抱く貴族たちが、主船長を「失われた父を探す」という名目で追い落とそうとする陰謀の中で、何度も持ち出された。しかし、陰謀を企てた最後の者も死んだ時、セベリアンが帰ってくるという話は、再び奇妙な話に過ぎなくなり、旗艦の将校たちが、稀に訪れる暇な時に、互いに語るような話になった。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.

traits.locale_text: ヴァランシウスのセベリアンは、その後、宇宙のどこにも姿を見せなかった。しかし、彼の名は、ダゴヌスで不満を抱く貴族たちが、主船長を「失われた父を探す」という名目で追い落とそうとする陰謀の中で、何度も持ち出された。しかし、陰謀を企てた最後の者も死んだ時、セベリアンが帰ってくるという話は、再び奇妙な話に過ぎなくなり、旗艦の将校たちが、稀に訪れる暇な時に、互いに語るような話になった。

languages.text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯自此绝迹于科罗努斯扩区。然而，达戈努斯那些心怀不满的贵族们仍屡屡搬出他的名号，密谋以“寻找失踪先主”为借口，罢免舰长大人。但等这批阴谋家死绝后，塞贝里安的回归便沦为一种离奇传说，成了旗舰军官们在难得清闲时打发时间的谈资。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯自此绝迹于科罗努斯扩区。然而，达戈努斯那些心怀不满的贵族们仍屡屡搬出他的名号，密谋以“寻找失踪先主”为借口，罢免舰长大人。但等这批阴谋家死绝后，塞贝里安的回归便沦为一种离奇传说，成了旗舰军官们在难得清闲时打发时间的谈资。

languages.text: On ne revit plus jamais Seberian von Valancius dans les Étendues. Malgré sa disparition, son nom fut cité à plusieurs reprises par les nobles insatisfaits de Dargonus, qui conspiraient pour évincer {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} sous prétexte de « retrouver l'ancêtre perdu ». Cependant, après la mort du dernier de ces comploteurs, le retour de Seberian redevint un simple mythe parmi tant d'autres histoires étranges que se racontaient les officiers du vaisseau amiral dans leurs rares moments de loisir.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.

traits.locale_text: On ne revit plus jamais Seberian von Valancius dans les Étendues. Malgré sa disparition, son nom fut cité à plusieurs reprises par les nobles insatisfaits de Dargonus, qui conspiraient pour évincer {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} sous prétexte de « retrouver l'ancêtre perdu ». Cependant, après la mort du dernier de ces comploteurs, le retour de Seberian redevint un simple mythe parmi tant d'autres histoires étranges que se racontaient les officiers du vaisseau amiral dans leurs rares moments de loisir.

languages.text: Jamás se volvió a ver a Seberian von Valancius en la Extensión. Su nombre, no obstante, se mencionó varias veces más entre las casas nobles insatisfechas de Dargonus, que conspiraban para exiliar a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán bajo el pretexto de «encontrar al señor perdido». Cuando el último de esos traidores murió, el regreso de Seberian volvió a convertirse en una historia peculiar sin más, de esas que cuentan los oficiales de la nave insignia en sus escasos momentos de descanso.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.

Su nombre, no obstante, se mencionó varias veces más entre las casas nobles insatisfechas de Dargonus, que conspiraban para exiliar a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán bajo el pretexto de «encontrar al señor perdido». Cuando el último de esos traidores murió, el regreso de Seberian volvió a convertirse en una historia peculiar sin más, de esas que cuentan los oficiales de la nave insignia en sus escasos momentos de descanso.

languages.text: Seberian von Valancius, Enginlik'te bir daha hiç görülmedi. Ancak adı, Lord Kaptan'ı "kayıp atayı bulma" bahanesiyle görevden almak için komplo kuran Dargonus'taki hoşnutsuz soylu hanelerce birkaç kez daha gündeme getirildi. Bu komplocuların sonuncusu da ölüp gittiğinde Seberian'ın dönüşü, sancak gemisi subaylarının nadir bulunan boş vakitlerinde birbirlerine anlattıkları tuhaf bir hikâyeden ibaret kaldı.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.

languages.text: Seberian von Valancius wurde in der Ausdehnung nie mehr gesehen. Sein Name wurde jedoch von den unzufriedenen Adelshäusern auf Dargonus, die unter dem Vorwand, 'den verschwundenen Herrn zu finden', den Sturz des Lord Captains betrieben, immer wieder ins Gespräch gebracht. Am Ende all dieser Intrigen war Seberians Rückkehr allerdings erneut nichts als eine seltsame Legende, die sich Flaggschiff-Offiziere in ihrer knapp bemessenen Freizeit erzählten.
